name: outridr
description: Ride flank on your coding agents — expose a herdr machine to your tailnet for the outridr mobile app

scripts.check: node --check bin/outridr.mjs && node --check lib/config.mjs && node --check lib/config-write.mjs && node --check lib/herdr.mjs && node --check lib/http-util.mjs && node --check lib/pair.mjs && node --check lib/push.mjs && node --check lib/qr.mjs && node --check lib/repos.mjs && node --check lib/server.mjs && node --check lib/service.mjs && node --check lib/session.mjs && node --check lib/websocket.mjs
scripts.check:versions: node -e "const {readFileSync}=require('node:fs'); const v=require('./package.json').version; const m=readFileSync('herdr-plugin.toml','utf8').match(/^version = \"(.+)\"$/m); if(!m||m[1]!==v){console.error('herdr-plugin.toml version '+(m?m[1]:'<missing>')+' != package.json '+v); process.exit(1);}"
